problems.diagnostic: Ardupilot_Software (identifier) is not a package or a property set visible or existing
problems.cause: Reference to non-existent AADL package in model scope
problems.minimal_edit: Remove or correct reference to Ardupilot_Software package

executor_steps: Identify all references to Ardupilot_Software in the model
Remove or replace Ardupilot_Software references with valid AADL identifiers
Ensure all referenced packages and properties exist in the model or are properly imported
